summary: Successfully verified all Peptimancer validation hotfixes. Backend now properly returns 400 status codes for invalid sequences, empty sequences, and special characters. Frontend button state management and error display working perfectly. All validation improvements functioning as expected.

resolved_bugs.issue: Invalid amino acid sequences (INVALID123) now correctly return 400 Bad Request
resolved_bugs.verification: Tested with INVALID123 - returns 400 with proper error message

resolved_bugs.issue: Empty sequences now correctly return 400 Bad Request
resolved_bugs.verification: Tested with empty string - returns 400 with proper error message

resolved_bugs.issue: Special characters (HAE-GTF@TSD) now correctly return 400 Bad Request
resolved_bugs.verification: Tested with special chars - returns 400 with proper error message

resolved_bugs.issue: Empty validation endpoint now handles gracefully
resolved_bugs.verification: Returns 200 with proper error structure instead of 404

minor_fixes.issue: Fixed clean_sequence variable scope issue in generate_analogues endpoint

resolved_bugs.issue: Button now correctly disabled for invalid sequences
resolved_bugs.verification: Button properly disabled for empty, invalid, and special character sequences

resolved_bugs.issue: Error messages now properly displayed for all invalid input types
resolved_bugs.verification: Shows specific error messages for different validation failures

passed_tests: HOTFIX: Invalid amino acid sequences return 400 Bad Request (INVALID123)
HOTFIX: Empty sequences return 400 Bad Request
HOTFIX: Special characters return 400 Bad Request (HAE-GTF@TSD)
HOTFIX: Empty validation endpoint handles gracefully
HOTFIX: Valid sequences still work correctly (HAEGTFTSDVSSYLEG)
Frontend button correctly disabled for invalid sequences
Frontend error messages display for invalid sequences
Frontend validation state management working properly
End-to-end analogue generation with valid sequences
Real-time sequence validation and error display
Sequence validation for invalid amino acids
Advanced validation edge cases (numbers, mixed case, very long sequences)
